title: Skyline Penthouse
testimonial: This is exactly what I imagined — and more. The team understood my brief on the first meeting and didn't deviate once. The craftsmanship of the joinery alone is worth every rupee.
description: A 6,000 sq ft sky-level penthouse with panoramic sea views. Full interior fit-out including 5 bedrooms, a double-height living room, chef's kitchen, home theatre, wine cellar, and rooftop infinity pool deck. Materials featured Calacatta marble, book-matched veneer panels, custom brass hardware, and smart home integration throughout.
